title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCX. Jingles.
content:
Little Tee Wee,
        He went to sea
        In an open boat;
        And while afloat
        The little boat bended,
        And my story's ended.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCX. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
